name: OPEN UP, DA HORNY POLICE IS AT THE DOOR
description:
𝚆𝙷𝙾𝙾𝙿! 𝚆𝙷𝙾𝙾𝙿! 𝚃𝚑𝚊𝚝'𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝙳𝙰 𝙿𝙾𝙻𝙸𝙲𝙴! 𝙰𝚗𝚍 𝚠𝚑𝚒𝚕𝚎 𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚊𝚛𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚍𝚛𝚞𝚐𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚏𝚝, 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚐𝚎𝚜 𝚊𝚛𝚎, 𝚞𝚑, 𝚊 𝚕𝚒𝚝𝚝𝚕𝚎 𝚅𝙴𝚁𝚈 "𝚕𝚎𝚠𝚍 & 𝙷𝙰𝙽𝙳𝚂-𝙾𝙽", 𝚕𝚎𝚝'𝚜 𝚜𝚊𝚢...

👮🏻‍♀️💙⛓️‍💥🖤🚔

Art By El_Memc (MeM)

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

Now, this bot... could be a hint to MANY of you here.

And considering we're almost hitting 2k followers, and my last "mother and daughter on the beach" bot practically exploded, I'd say it's... more like "a VERY direct hint." 💀

Still, OF COURSE I appreciate aaaaall the support. 😊✨💗 Although, yes. The Horny Police would take more than one of us out here if they had the chance. Watch out for that. 👀

Oh, and don't think I'm forgetting that she's THAT French policewoman. Did you think I'd be that careless? Pfff.

However, this is still a simple bot. A filler, just like junk food. Delicious and THICC, but not the best I can COOK. ;) I still hope you enjoy this quick dish with a little French. 😋🇫🇷

Enjoy this and don't let the Horny Police catch you, gooners... Oh, did you hear that? THEY'RE COMING FOR YOU. 🚔👮🏻‍♀️🚨🚨🚨
